"'''Just Business'''" was a short story written by [[Paul Danner]], centered on the dealings of [[Yin Vocta]], an [[Anomid/Legends|Anomid]] businessman on [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was made for ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'', but never made it into an issue, although it was later released to the Internet.<ref name="SWFA">{{WebCite|url=https://www.myuselessknowledge.com/swfa/justbusiness.html|text=Just Business|author=[[Paul Danner]]|date=2000-12|work=[https://www.myuselessknowledge.com Star Wars Fanboy Association]|archivedate=20231120170544}}</ref>

{{Shortstory-stub}}
